```{=html}
<div style="width:80%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.6em 1em 1.4em;border-radius:18px;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">design principle 01</div>
 <div style="font-size:1.5em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.85em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">Less is more.</div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;margin-top:0.6em;">
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.85em 0.6em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.12);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.3em;font-weight:900;color:#C4881A;line-height:1;">4–8</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:0.25em;">chars per name</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.85em 0.6em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.12);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.3em;font-weight:900;color:#C4881A;line-height:1;">6–10</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:0.25em;">active skills</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.85em 0.6em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.12);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.3em;font-weight:900;color:#D45F47;line-height:1;">long</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:0.25em;">name = too many</div>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.95em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;font-style:italic;">
  bundle wins once. focused set wins daily.
 </div>

</div>
```
